description:
When MAX_PHASE_REWORKS (3) is exceeded, the workflow currently transitions to Failed (terminal). Instead, it should transition to a new HumanEscalated state that parks the workflow awaiting human feedback, preserving the full decision history.

Changes needed:
1. Add HumanEscalated to WorkflowMachineState enum in types.rs
2. Add HumanFeedbackProvided to WorkflowMachineEvent enum
3. Update state_machines/schema.rs transitions:
   - ApplyTransition --[ReworkBudgetExceeded]--> HumanEscalated (instead of Failed)
   - HumanEscalated --[HumanFeedbackProvided]--> EvaluateTransition
   - HumanEscalated --[CancelRequested]--> Cancelled
4. Add pause_reason field to OrchestratorWorkflow (UserRequested | ReworkBudgetExceeded | MergeConflict)
5. Update ao workflow resume to accept --feedback flag that injects human guidance into the next phase prompt
6. Update state_machine_parity.rs tests for new state
7. Update Web UI and MCP to surface HumanEscalated workflows distinctly from Paused

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/types.rs (WorkflowMachineState, WorkflowMachineEvent)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machines/schema.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/state_machine_parity.rs
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs
title: Add HumanEscalated workflow state for rework budget exhaustion
